Bus Timings

Sharjah Bus 8: Full Route and Stops Guide

July 23, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Sharjah Bus 8 connects Sahara Centre Terminal and Al Rolla Terminal, linking major residential, commercial, and shopping areas in Sharjah. The route includes key stops in Al Nahda, Al Khan, and Al Wahda Street, providing easy access to essential amenities and popular destinations. With frequent and reliable service throughout the day, Bus 8 is a convenient choice for both daily commuters and visitors.

Route Name 8
Route Description Sahara Centre Terminal - Al Rolla Terminal
Total Distance Approximately 13-15 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 30-60 minutes
Operational Hours 06:00 to 22:42 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 8 (Cash) / AED 6 (Sayer Card)
Official Website SRTA Gov

Download PDF Bus 8

Bus Timings

Bus 8 operates with a consistent schedule throughout the day, ensuring frequent service. Here are the departure times:

  • From Al Rolla Terminal: 06:00, 06:08, 06:16, 06:24, 06:32, 06:40, 06:48, 06:56, 07:04, 07:12, 07:20, 07:28, 07:36, 07:44, 07:52, 08:00, 08:08, 08:16, 08:24, 08:32, 08:40, 08:48, 08:56, 09:04, 09:12, 09:20, 09:28, 09:36, 09:44, 09:52, 10:06, 10:20, 10:34, 10:48, 11:02, 11:16, 11:30, 11:44, 11:58, 12:12, 12:26, 12:40, 12:54, 13:08, 13:22, 13:36, 13:50, 14:04, 14:18, 14:32, 14:46, 15:00, 15:14, 15:28, 15:42, 15:56, 16:10, 16:24, 16:38, 16:52, 17:06, 17:20, 17:34, 17:48, 18:02, 18:16, 18:30, 18:44, 18:58, 19:12, 19:26, 19:40, 19:54, 20:08, 20:22, 20:36, 20:50, 21:04, 21:18, 21:32, 21:46, 22:00, 22:14, 22:28, 22:42

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 8 aligns with Sharjah’s standard public transport pricing, offering affordability for all passengers. Ticket prices cater to both regular commuters and occasional travelers. Passengers can choose to pay with cash, which costs AED 8 per trip, or use the Sayer card, which offers a discounted fare of AED 6. The Sayer card provides a convenient, contactless payment option and is an economical choice for frequent travelers.

Bus Booking

These apps provide real-time updates on bus schedules, route details, and estimated arrival times. While there is no online seat booking, these tools ensure passengers are well-informed and can manage their travel efficiently. For accurate and current information, downloading the RTA Sharjah app is recommended for a smooth travel experience.

Bus Route

Bus 8 follows a well-structured route with numerous stops, ensuring that passengers can easily reach their desired destinations. The route details are as follows:

  1. Sahara Centre Terminal

  2. Al Nahda Terminal

  3. Bukhara Street

  4. Al Nahda, Orchid Tower

  5. Al Nahda, Ramada Hotel

  6. Al Nahda, Al Roda Tower

  7. Ansar Mall

  8. BM towers

  9. Al Nahda (Al Safeer Mall)

  10. Al Khan Interchange

  11. Al Wahda East (Subway)

  12. Al Wahda Center, 2

  13. City Center

  14. Al Wahda Street, Lulu Hypermarket

  15. Al Wahda Street, Toyota Showroom

  16. Industrial Area 4

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Nissan Showroom

  2. Gold Center

  3. Golden Fork

  4. Spinneys

  5. Baladiya Office

  6. ADCB Bank

  7. Panasonic Tower

  8. Al Warqf Center

  9. Al Rolla Terminal

Bus 8 Station Overview

Sahara Centre Terminal

Sahara Centre Terminal is a well-known bus station located adjacent to the popular Sahara Centre shopping mall in Sharjah.

The terminal is equipped with basic facilities, and its strategic location near the Dubai-Sharjah border makes it a convenient stop for those traveling between the two emirates. With various bus routes connecting through this terminal, it ensures smooth transit for passengers heading to different parts of Sharjah and Dubai.

Al Rolla Terminal

Al Rolla Terminal is one of Sharjah’s busiest bus stations, located in the heart of the city. This terminal is a major transit hub that connects various bus routes, making it a central point for commuters traveling within Sharjah and to other emirates.

The terminal is well-equipped with amenities such as seating areas, ticket counters, and nearby shops, providing a comfortable waiting environment for passengers. Its location in a densely populated area ensures that it serves a large number of daily commuters, making it a vital part of Sharjah’s public transport network.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 8 passes by several notable locations and attractions in Sharjah:

  1. Sahara Centre Terminal: A major shopping mall with a variety of retail outlets, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

  2. Al Nahda: This area features the Orchid Tower, Ramada Hotel, and Al Roda Tower, offering various dining and shopping experiences.

  3. Ansar Mall: A large shopping complex with diverse retail shops and eateries.

  4. Al Khan Interchange: Nearby, you can visit Al Khan Beach for a relaxing seaside experience.

  5. City Center: Another significant shopping destination with numerous stores and dining options.

  6. Al Wahda Street: Home to Lulu Hypermarket and Toyota Showroom, offering shopping and automotive services.

7.

  1. Baladiya Office: Located near various cultural and historical sites.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can conveniently travel to Al Rolla Terminal, the furthest point on the Bus 8 route, starting from Sahara Centre Terminal, with a price range of AED 31-37. Since the app does not pinpoint Sahara Centre Terminal directly, you can select Spinney’s Parking at Sahara Centre Mall as the nearest pickup point. For the destination, choose the ROLLA SQUARE PARK pickup point, which is close to Al Rolla Terminal. This ensures a smooth and efficient journey to your desired location.

Bus 8 serves as a crucial link between Sahara Centre Terminal and Al Rolla Terminal, connecting major residential, commercial, and shopping areas in Sharjah. Whether you’re commuting to work, shopping, or exploring Sharjah, Bus 8 offers a reliable and convenient public transport option.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 23, 2025.
